mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist ( playlistno, playlistemotionno, title, description, youtubeurl, thumbnail, adminno, rdate ) VALUES ( playlist_seq.NEXTVAL, #{playlistemotionno}, #{title}, #{description}, #{youtubeurl}, #{thumbnail}, #{adminno}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM playlist ORDER BY rdate DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE playlist SET playlistemotionno = #{playlistemotionno}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, youtubeurl = #{youtubeurl}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, adminno = #{adminno} WHERE playlistno = #{playlistno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM playlist WHERE playlistemotionno = #{emotionno} ORDER BY rdate DESC

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno) AS likecount, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno AND pl.memberno = #{memberno}) AS liked FROM playlist p ORDER BY p.rdate DESC

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno) AS likecount, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno AND pl.memberno = #{memberno}) AS liked FROM playlist p WHERE p.playlistemotionno = #{emotionno} ORDER BY p.rdate DESC

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno) AS likecount, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno AND pl.memberno = #{memberno}) AS liked FROM playlist p WHERE p.playlistno = #{playlistno}
